pending.body: `run status` still loses iteration progress across resume/retry boundaries. The iterative-minimal resume path overwrites the restored loop state with a generic summary at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:2402`, and stage re-entry does the same at `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:5725-5732` even when `iterative_implementer_state` is already present. Because `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs:320-328` and `src/contexts/project_run_record/queries.rs:357-380` just echo `snapshot.status_summary`, a resumed or retried implementer loop shows `running: Plan and Implement` instead of `running: Plan and Implement (iteration N/M)` until the next iteration write lands.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 18 -> Plan and Implement
